text_excerpt: News | Rishi Sunak MP Skip to main content Main navigation About Me Latest News My Plan Campaigns Contact News Rishi is confident solution which keeps a GP in Reeth is in sight Friday, 24 April, 2026 Rishi has said he is encouraged by the progress made in keeping a GP service in Reeth. Following contact with regional health chiefs on Friday (April 24), he is confident that a plan involving the Central Dales Practice at Hawes and Aysgarth running Reeth as a branch surgery should provide a solution. He said: “I understand that following the submission of the business plan by the Central Dales...
